title: Data Science Minor Dissertation

prerequisites.text: Successful completion of the coursework component of the Masters course in Data Science.

outline: The research component of the degree is based on a 90 credit dissertation. The topic of the research will be based on an analysis of large data sets from Astronomy.
assessment: The minor dissertation must be presented for formal examination. Coursework and minor dissertation each count 50% towards the degree; each must be passed separately for the award of the degree.
